content.name: Production Stations
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description: Adds a Production Stations tab to the Property Owned menu. Shows all player-owned stations with production modules. Optionally filters to stations with storage issues (full or empty resources, intermediates, or products).

text.name: Production Stations
text.description: Adds a Production Stations tab to the Property Owned menu. Shows all player-owned stations with production modules. Optionally filters to stations with storage issues (full or empty resources, intermediates, or products).
